re_viewer0.21.0-alpha.1+dev

In re_viewer::external::re_space_view

Function re_viewer::external::re_space_view::clamped_or_nothing

source Â· 
pub fn clamped_or_nothing<T>(
    values: &[T],
    clamped_len: usize,
) -> impl Iterator<Item = &T> + Clone
Expand description

Clamp the last value in values in order to reach a length of clamped_len.

Returns an empty iterator if values is empty.
